title: Užice, Zlatibor — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Užice, Zlatibor: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Užice is a city in Zlatibor with a population of 55,000. A city in western Serbia on the Đetinja River, the gateway to Zlatibor mountain and known for its copper industry and historic old town.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
